info.title: 📢 Official Information — BLACKCOIN
info.intro: The <1>BLACKCOIN</1> team is actively developing the project with many major features in preparation.
info.aboutText1: BLACKCOIN is an international collaborative initiative launched on March 21, 2024, aiming to build a strong, transparent, and sustainable digital ecosystem.
info.aboutText2: To view the White Paper, Roadmap, and Privacy Policy, please visit our official website:
info.communicationText1: All official information, updates, and important announcements regarding BLACKCOIN are published exclusively through our official website and social media channels.
info.communicationText2: We encourage you to always verify information via our official channels to avoid confusion.
info.footer: Thank you for being part of BLACKCOIN's evolution.

userProfile.warningIncomplete: ⚠️ Complete your profile to access all features
